suggestions.title: Cattle feed supplement
steps: Feed to cattle in moderate quantities

suggestions.title: Natural face pack for oily skin
steps: Rub inner side of peel on clean face

suggestions.title: Plant fertiliser
steps: Dry peels in sun for 2-3 days

disclaimers: Do not feed banana peels to pets in large quantities. Patch test face pack before full application.

suggestions.title: Compost enrichment
steps: Mix with dry leaves and paper

suggestions.title: Natural garden fertiliser
steps: Boil peels in water for 15 minutes

suggestions.title: Bird feed (not for dogs)
steps: Place in bird feeder away from dogs

disclaimers: NEVER feed potato peels to dogs or cats — solanine toxicity risk.

suggestions.title: Hair conditioning mask
steps: Apply curd evenly to scalp and hair

disclaimers: Do not consume expired curd. Avoid face application if you have active acne or skin infections.

suggestions.title: Wood polish and conditioner
steps: Apply small amount to soft cloth

disclaimers: Do not consume expired coconut oil. Test on small area of leather first.

suggestions.title: Summer cooling face pack
steps: Grind white part of rind into paste

disclaimers: Rinse rinds thoroughly to remove pesticide residue before any use.

suggestions.title: Topical wound application
steps: Mix with small amount of water to form paste
Apply to minor cuts or wounds

suggestions.title: Plant pest repellent
steps: Mix 1 tsp turmeric in 1 litre water

disclaimers: Do not consume expired turmeric. Turmeric may stain skin and fabric temporarily.

suggestions.title: Composting material
steps: Add to compost bin as brown material

suggestions.title: Glass and window cleaner
steps: Wipe with newspaper for streak-free shine

suggestions.title: Seedling starter pots
steps: Fill with soil and plant seeds

disclaimers: Avoid using coloured newspaper pages for composting or food contact.

suggestions.title: Self-watering plant pot
steps: Invert top half into bottom half

suggestions.title: Bird feeder
steps: Cut openings on sides of bottle

disclaimers: Do not reuse food-grade plastic bottles for storing chemicals.

suggestions.title: Drawer and shelf organiser
steps: Cover with decorative paper if desired

disclaimers: Remove tape and labels before composting. Avoid waxed or coated cardboard for composting.

suggestions.title: Leather shoe cleaner
steps: Dip cloth in slightly sour milk

suggestions.title: Plant calcium supplement
steps: Provides calcium to prevent blossom end rot

disclaimers: Do not consume expired milk. Dilute properly before garden use to avoid odour.

suggestions.title: Natural room freshener
steps: Dry peels in sun for 2-3 days

suggestions.title: Natural face scrub
steps: Dry and grind peels into powder
Gently scrub face in circular motion

disclaimers: Citrus peels in large amounts can be harmful to some animals. Patch test face scrub before use.

suggestions.title: Garden fertiliser for acid-loving plants
steps: Spread grounds around rose bushes and azaleas

suggestions.title: Natural odour absorber
steps: Keep in refrigerator or near garbage bin

suggestions.title: Body scrub exfoliant
steps: Gently scrub skin in circular motion

disclaimers: Coffee grounds can make soil more acidic — avoid using on alkaline-loving plants.

suggestions.title: Natural pest deterrent
steps: Sharp edges deter slugs and snails

suggestions.title: Seed starter pots
steps: Fill with soil and plant seeds

disclaimers: Wash shells thoroughly to prevent bacterial growth and odour.

suggestions.title: Bird feed
steps: Spread dry rice in open area

disclaimers: Do not consume expired rice. Do not feed mouldy rice to birds.

suggestions.title: Homemade play dough
steps: Mix flour with salt and water

suggestions.title: Natural cleaning paste
steps: Mix flour with water to form paste

disclaimers: Check for mould or weevils before using expired flour for any purpose.
